                      . simp [tailSL, h, fromSL]
                ) (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)
                exact this))
          simp [Function.comp, dropWhileSL, hhs, hp, hne]
          rw [ht]
          simp [List.dropWhile]
          have : dropWhileSL p (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)) = dropWhileSL p (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)) := rfl
          have hlen : lengthSL (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)) < lengthSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok) :=
            length_tail_lt_length (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok) (by
              intro hnil
              have : headSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok) = none := by
                simpa [hnil] using (by rfl : headSL nil = none)
              exact hh this)
          have := ih (tail (fromSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok))) (by simpa [ht] using rfl) ?_ ?_ ?_
          · simpa [Function.comp] using this
          · exact (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)).lhs
          · exact (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)).rhs
          · exact (tailSL (SymList.mk lhs rhs ok)).ok
        · simp [dropWhileSL, hne, hhs, hp, fromSL, Function.comp]

unfold dropWhileSL
  by_cases hempty : lhs.isEmpty ∧ rhs.isEmpty
  · rcases hempty with ⟨hl, hr⟩
    simp [fromSL, hl, hr, nil, dropWhile, List.dropWhile]
  · have hhead : headSL (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok) = (lhs ++ rhs.reverse).head? := by
      simp [headSL, fromSL]
    have : ¬ (lhs ++ rhs.reverse).isEmpty := by
      intro h'
      apply hempty
      have hnil : lhs ++ rhs.reverse = [] := by
        simpa [List.isEmpty_iff] using h'
      have hlnil : lhs = [] := by
        have := (List.append_eq_nil_iff).1 hnil
        exact this.1
      have hrnil : rhs = [] := by
        have := (List.append_eq_nil_iff).1 hnil
        have : rhs.reverse = [] := this.2
        simpa using congrArg List.reverse this
      simp [List.isEmpty_iff, hlnil, hrnil]
    have hhead' : headSL (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok) = none ↔ lhs ++ rhs.reverse = [] := by
      simp [hhead]
    have hheadne : headSL (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok) ≠ none := by
      intro hnone
      have : lhs ++ rhs.reverse = [] := (hhead'.1 hnone)
      have : (lhs ++ rhs.reverse).isEmpty := by
        simp [List.isEmpty_iff, this]
      exact this.elim (by simpa using this) 
    cases hhs : headSL (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok) with
    | none =>
      exfalso
      apply hheadne
      simpa [hhs]
    | some hsl =>
      simp [hhs]
      by_cases hp : p hsl
      · simp [hp]
        have hlen : lengthSL (tailSL (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok)) < lengthSL (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok) :=
          length_tail_lt_length (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok) (by
            intro hnil
            apply hempty
            have : (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok).lhs = [] ∧ (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok).rhs = [] := by
              simp [nil] at hnil
              subst hnil
              simp
            simpa using this)
        have ih :=
          (dropWhileSL._termination
            (a := a) (p := p) (sl := tailSL (SymList.mk a lhs rhs ok)) hlen).1
        simpa [dropWhile, List.dropWhile, fromSL] using ih
      · simp [hp, dropWhile, List.dropWhile, fromSL, headSL] at hhs ⊢
        cases lhs with
        | nil =>
          cases rhs with
          | nil =>
            exfalso
            apply hempty
            simp
          | cons r rs =>
            simp [fromSL, headSL, hp]
        | cons l ls =>
            simp [fromSL, headSL, hp]
